scope: AgenC plugin command, hook, agent, server, output-style, and active refresh registration

Rust manager semantics are projected into TypeScript active-refresh orchestration.

omissions.reason: Shell-command expansion inside prompt Markdown is intentionally not carried in PK-03; command registration only performs argument and AgenC plugin-template substitution.

MCPB/DXT bundle extraction and URL bundle loading are not carried. PK-03 registers normalized local MCP maps emitted by the AgenC loader; bundle install/extraction belongs to later plugin-runtime or marketplace rows.
Remote settings hot-reload subscriptions are not carried. PK-03 exposes deterministic load/register functions and wires /reload-plugins to refresh active surfaces.
Full TUI output-style selection is not carried. PK-03 loads plugin output-style records and includes them in active refresh snapshots for later prompt/TUI integration.
Rust plugin process management, registry sync, and installation policy are outside PK-03. This row carries runtime registration orchestration over already-discovered local plugin manifests.

requiredBehaviors: Load enabled plugin command declarations and skills from the AgenC plugin loader
Apply command metadata, argument substitution, and AgenC plugin path/data/session variables
Wire runtime command discovery and cache clearing to the AgenC-owned registration module
Load enabled plugin agent Markdown into PluginAgentDefinition records
Ignore per-agent permission, hook, and MCP escalation fields
Namespace MCP and LSP servers as plugin:pluginName:serverName
Inject AGENC_PLUGIN_ROOT, AGENC_PLUGIN_DATA, and AGENC_PLUGIN_NAME into plugin server environments
Merge plugin MCP/LSP declarations into /reload-plugins refresh config
Refresh commands, skills, agents, hooks, MCP, LSP, and output styles from one enabled-plugin snapshot
Update AppState plugin and MCP reconnect surfaces
